corrected_fields.summary: This is a navigation/index page listing all FOMC press releases from 2022 on the Federal Reserve website. The page contains 15 dated entries including 8 FOMC statements and 4 sets of economic projections. No substantive policy content is present—this index page only provides links to individual press releases.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This index page serves as a reference guide to 2022 Fed policy communications but contains no actionable policy content. Researchers must navigate to individual press releases for actual statements and projection details.
corrected_fields.macro_context: This page indexes 2022 FOMC communications when the Fed aggressively tightened monetary policy, raising rates from 0-0.25% in March 2022 to 4.25-4.50% by December 2022.
